namedTypes.comment:
Struct node shape with custom rdf:type's.

The shaclmate:fromRdfType is expected on deserialization.
shaclmate:toRdfType's are added an serialization.
namedTypes.name: ExplicitFromToRdfTypesStruct

namedTypes.comment:
Struct node shape with custom rdf:type's.

The shaclmate:rdfType is expected on deserialization and added on serialization.
namedTypes.name: ExplicitRdfTypeStruct

namedTypes.comment: Node shape that unions a node shape and another union of node shapes. Generated code will usually flatten these.
